curation_notes: Pre-assigned as command-injection from CWE-78, but the patch adds path validation (checking for .., absolute paths, alt separators) to file paths received from a remote server JSON response in the HTTP artifact repository's list_artifacts method. The vulnerability mechanism is path traversal — unsanitized paths allow escaping the intended artifact directory to write arbitrary files — not command injection via shell/exec calls. Reclassified to path-traversal. The fix moved validate_path_is_safe from handlers.py to uri.py and added a call in the HTTP artifact repo. Three non-test source files changed, so the patch is not noisy. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern; other artifact repos use cloud SDKs or local filesystem APIs rather than untrusted HTTP JSON responses.
